name: Hospitality Property Inspection
description: Commercial hospitality property condition assessment — includes guest rooms, commercial kitchen, and pool/spa facilities.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Grading & Drainage was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Grading & Drainage requires repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Guest room HVAC units were inspected in a representative sample and appear in serviceable condition. Thermostats are responsive and airflow is adequate.

information.title: PTAC units
information.comment: Guest rooms are equipped with packaged terminal air conditioning (PTAC) units in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to a representative sample of guest rooms; not all units were individually tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Guest room HVAC units show signs of inadequate cooling/heating, excessive noise, or condensate leaks; recommend service by an HVAC technician.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Guest room HVAC unit presents a safety concern due to electrical deficiency or gas leak; recommend immediate lock-out and repair.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Guest room plumbing fixtures were inspected in a representative sample. Faucets, drains, and toilets appear in serviceable condition with adequate water pressure.

information.title: Anti-scald valves
information.comment: Shower and tub fixtures are equipped with anti-scald mixing valves per code requirements.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to a representative sample of guest rooms; concealed piping not evaluated.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Guest room plumbing shows leaks, low pressure, or fixture deterioration; recommend repair by a licensed plumber.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Guest room plumbing presents a safety concern due to missing anti-scald protection or cross-connection risk; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Guest room finishes — flooring, walls, ceilings, and millwork — were inspected in a representative sample and appear in serviceable condition.

information.title: Recently renovated
information.comment: Guest room finishes appear to have been recently renovated and are in good condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to a representative sample of guest rooms; cosmetic conditions vary room to room.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Guest room finishes show wear, water staining, or damage requiring cosmetic repair or renovation.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Guest room fire safety features — smoke detectors, sprinkler heads, and egress signage — were inspected in a representative sample and appear functional.

information.title: Sprinklered
information.comment: Guest rooms are fully sprinklered with heads in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visual observation; functional testing of alarm and suppression systems is beyond the scope of this assessment.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Guest room fire safety devices are missing, obstructed, or appear non-functional; recommend evaluation by a fire protection specialist.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Guest room fire safety deficiency poses an immediate life-safety risk; recommend urgent correction and fire marshal notification.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Commercial kitchen exhaust hood and make-up air system were inspected and appear in serviceable condition. Grease filters are present and airflow is adequate.

information.title: Recently cleaned
information.comment: Kitchen exhaust ductwork appears to have been recently cleaned per NFPA 96 schedule.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible hood, filters, and ductwork access panels; internal ductwork condition not fully verified.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Kitchen ventilation system shows grease build-up, damaged filters, or inadequate airflow; recommend cleaning and service per NFPA 96.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Kitchen ventilation system presents a fire hazard due to excessive grease accumulation; recommend immediate professional cleaning.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Kitchen fire suppression system (Ansul/wet chemical) was inspected and appears in serviceable condition with current inspection tags.

information.title: Current inspection
information.comment: Fire suppression system has a current semi-annual inspection tag from a licensed contractor.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible nozzles, tanks, and inspection tags; internal agent charge and fusible links not tested.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Kitchen fire suppression system shows expired inspection tags, missing nozzle caps, or improperly aimed nozzles; recommend service by a licensed fire protection contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Kitchen fire suppression system appears non-functional or has lapsed certification; recommend immediate service and fire marshal notification.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Commercial kitchen plumbing — sinks, floor drains, grease trap, and hot water supply — was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

information.title: Grease trap adequate
information.comment: Grease interceptor is properly sized and appears to be on a regular pumping schedule.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible fixtures and accessible grease trap; underground waste lines not scoped.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Kitchen plumbing shows leaks, slow drains, or grease trap overflow; recommend service by a licensed plumber.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Built-in commercial kitchen equipment (walk-in coolers, ovens, dishwashers) was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

information.title: Walk-in cooler
information.comment: Walk-in cooler/freezer is maintaining proper temperature with adequate door seals and functional compressor.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to permanently installed equipment; portable small-wares and tenant-owned equipment excluded.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Built-in kitchen equipment shows malfunction, improper temperature, or worn components; recommend evaluation by a commercial kitchen equipment technician.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Kitchen equipment presents a safety concern due to gas leak, electrical fault, or refrigerant leak; recommend immediate lock-out and repair.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Pool mechanical equipment — pumps, filters, heater, and chemical controller — was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

information.title: VGB compliant
information.comment: Pool drain covers appear compliant with the Virginia Graeme Baker Pool and Spa Safety Act (VGB Act).

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible equipment; water chemistry, flow rates, and turnover calculations not performed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Pool equipment shows leaks, corroded fittings, or malfunctioning components; recommend service by a certified pool operator.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Pool equipment presents a safety hazard due to non-compliant drain covers, electrical bonding deficiency, or chemical handling violation; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Pool deck surfaces were inspected and appear in serviceable condition with adequate slip-resistant finish and proper drainage.

information.title: Code markings
information.comment: Pool depth markers and safety signage are present and legible per local health code requirements.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible deck surfaces; sub-grade conditions and waterproofing membranes not evaluated.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Pool deck shows cracking, settling, or deteriorated non-slip surface; recommend repair to prevent trip hazards.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Pool deck presents a safety hazard due to trip hazard, missing depth markers, or sharp edges; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Pool barrier fencing and self-closing/self-latching gates were inspected and appear in serviceable condition per applicable code.

information.title: Code height
information.comment: Pool fencing meets minimum height requirement per local building code.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible fencing and gate hardware; full perimeter code compliance survey not performed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Pool fencing shows damage, gaps, or non-functional gate hardware; recommend repair to maintain barrier integrity.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Pool fencing is inadequate or gate latch is non-functional, creating an unsupervised access risk; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Spa/hot tub equipment — pumps, heater, jets, and controls — was inspected and appears in serviceable condition.

information.title: VGB compliant
information.comment: Spa drain covers appear compliant with the VGB Act requirements.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible equipment and controls; internal piping and water chemistry not evaluated.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Spa equipment shows jet malfunction, heater issues, or worn seals; recommend service by a certified spa technician.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Spa equipment presents a safety hazard due to non-compliant drains, excessive temperature, or electrical bonding deficiency; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Common area floors were inspected and appear in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Floors require repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Public restrooms were inspected and appear in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible, accessible components at the time of inspection.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Restrooms require repair or further evaluation by a qualified professional.

information.title: Inspection certificate
information.comment: Current elevator inspection certificate was observed and within its valid period.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Vertical transportation evaluated visually; not test-operated through full cycle. Refer to the maintenance contractor's records.

defects.title: Service needed
defects.comment: Vertical transportation requires service or further evaluation by a licensed elevator contractor.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Sidewalks, curbs, and drive aisles were inspected and appear in serviceable condition; stormwater drains freely toward designed collection points.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible surface conditions; sub-grade drainage capacity and retention pond sizing were not calculated.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Flatwork/stormwater components show cracking, ponding, or settlement; recommend repair by a qualified site contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Flatwork/stormwater deficiency presents a trip or ponding safety hazard; recommend immediate correction.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Wood decks and balconies — framing, ledger connections, and guardrails — were inspected and appear in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible framing and connections; concealed ledger fasteners and flashing were not exposed.

defects.title: Repair needed
defects.comment: Wood deck/balcony shows rot, corroded fasteners, or deteriorated guardrails; recommend evaluation by a qualified contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Wood deck/balcony structural or guardrail deficiency presents a fall hazard; recommend immediate correction and restricted access until repaired.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Commercial cooking exhaust, hood, and fire suppression system were inspected and appear in serviceable condition with current service tags per NFPA 96.

limitations.title: Visual scope
limitations.comment: Inspection limited to visible hood, ductwork access panels, and suppression tags; internal duct condition and agent charge not verified.

defects.title: Service needed
defects.comment: Cooking area exhaust/suppression system requires cleaning or service per NFPA 96 by a licensed contractor.

defects.title: Safety concern
defects.comment: Cooking area exhaust/suppression system shows lapsed certification or excessive grease accumulation, presenting a fire hazard; recommend immediate professional service.
